description_long: This is a large, wooden sailing ship with a dark brown hull and a prominent raised stern structure. The vessel features a single tall central mast with rigging lines extending to the bow and stern, and a horizontal yardarm at the top. The hull is robust and rounded, with a pointed bow and a squared-off stern, both reinforced with visible planking. The deck is divided into two main levels: a lower open area at the bow and a higher, enclosed section at the stern, likely serving as the captain's quarters or storage. The ship's sides are adorned with horizontal striping, and the rigging is detailed, suggesting historical or early-modern maritime design. No visible modern equipment or markings are present, giving the ship an antique, possibly medieval or Renaissance-era appearance.
description: A large, dark wooden sailing ship with a single tall mast, detailed rigging, and a raised stern structure. The hull is rounded and reinforced, with horizontal striping and an antique maritime design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed bow, central mast, and symmetrical rigging lines.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the hull, raised stern, open bow deck, and detailed rigging.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the squared-off stern, raised superstructure, and central mast.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the hull's curvature, stern structure, and mast rigging.
attribute_hull_design: The hull is a displacement type with a rounded, reinforced structure, a pointed bow, and a squared-off stern. There are no visible keels or bulbous bows, and the hull features horizontal striping and prominent planking.
attribute_superstructure_layout: The superstructure consists of a raised stern section with at least two deck levels, an open bow deck, and a central mast with rigging. The stern structure appears to serve as a cabin or storage area.
